title: c2c Class 387/377 Electrostar (MTR4)
description: Adds the c2c Class 387 livery to Minecraft Transit Railway!
body:
![c2c Class 387 EMU](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/641d0294a69e2dc31f0b8e58458497f955836d85.png)

**From Fenchurch to Shoeburyness, the c2c Class 387 is here for Minecraft Transit Railway!**

This reskin of c2c livery includes both the primary livery and options for the Quiet Zone, because text over doors is mirrored on the Class 377/387. 
The options are:
Quiet Zone (Text)
Quiet Zone (Blank Strip)
Quiet Zone (Nothing) - Standard livery applied still

Enjoy going from capital 2 coast within the world of MTR4!

_Looking for the Class 357? You can find it [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/c2c-class-357-pack)_.
